+++
title = "Supported Languages and Frameworks"
description = "Programming languages and frameworks supported by Noir with feature compatibility details."
weight = 1
sort_by = "weight"

+++

Each card below lists a framework's supported features. **Route** covers endpoint/method/query/path/body/header/cookie/static/websocket plus `--include callee` callee extraction. **AI Context** covers the `--ai-context` buckets: guards, sinks, validators, and signals. Filled chips are supported; struck-through chips are not yet implemented.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED-->

<div class="tech-legend">
  <span class="tech-legend-item"><span class="tech-chip on">supported</span> available out of the box</span>
  <span class="tech-legend-item"><span class="tech-chip off">supported</span> not yet implemented</span>
</div>
